name: Page Consumer Services
description_short: Credit repair company offering dispute resolution and credit report accuracy services with monitoring across three major credit bureaus.
description_long:
Page Consumer Services is a credit repair firm located in Las Vegas, Nevada, operating out of 8275 S Eastern Ave. The company positions itself as a transparency-focused provider in the credit repair space, with an emphasis on client education throughout the repair process. According to their business profile, they have established operations during standard business hours (9 AM–5 PM, Monday–Friday) and maintain a phone line for client inquiries at +1-857-007-0243.

Page Consumer Services offers credit repair services centered on identifying and correcting inaccuracies in credit reports. Their service model includes direct dispute resolution, monitoring capabilities across all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion), and what they describe as aggressive negotiation tactics with creditors. The company emphasizes regular client communication, providing progress updates and explanations of each step in the repair process. They tailor services to individual client needs rather than offering one-size-fits-all solutions.

The company differentiates itself through comprehensive tri-bureau monitoring, direct creditor negotiation, and an educational component aimed at building long-term financial literacy among clients. Their marketing materials emphasize professional team expertise, transparent procedures, and consistent customer support. The website notes that business verification has not yet been completed on the directory platform.

However, several important caveats apply: the business listing contains zero verified customer reviews despite promotional language suggesting high client satisfaction, the generated review summary appears to be AI-created rather than based on actual customer feedback, and there is an anomalous Q&A post asking about signature dishes (indicating potential platform confusion or listing quality issues). Results are acknowledged to vary by individual circumstances and may take extended time to materialize. Consumers should independently verify the company's credentials, licensing, and track record before engaging services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers monitoring across all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Emphasis on transparency and detailed communication throughout dispute process
Tailored service approach customized to individual client circumstances
Employs direct creditor negotiation tactics for dispute resolution
Regular progress updates and client education on financial literacy
Professional team expertise in identifying credit report inaccuracies
Established physical office location in Las Vegas with standard business hours
cons: Zero verified customer reviews despite optimistic marketing language raises authenticity questions
Review summary appears AI-generated rather than based on actual customer feedback
Business verification not completed on directory platform where profile appears
Results explicitly stated as variable and time-dependent, with no guaranteed timeline
Listing contains quality issues (unrelated Q&A about restaurant dishes) suggesting directory management problems
best_for: Consumers with documented inaccuracies or errors on their credit reports
Individuals seeking dispute resolution without DIY effort
People wanting ongoing monitoring and communication during credit repair
diagnosis: Page Consumer Services is positioned for consumers seeking professional credit dispute resolution with emphasis on communication and monitoring. Critical caveat: The complete absence of verified customer reviews, AI-generated review content, and unresolved business verification significantly limit confidence in advertised claims—independent verification of credentials, licensing, and actual customer results is essential before engagement.
services: Credit report dispute and error correction
Credit report accuracy analysis and identification
Progress tracking and regular client updates
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 8275 S Eastern Ave, Las Vegas, NV 89123
